creator: m3systemmm@gmail.com
text:
Whe I update the PostgreSQL to 9.6.2 the pg_activity 1.3.0 stop to working.

I use the ports to install pg_activity 1.3.0

When a run the pg_activity 1.3.0 the erro came up

M3System-MatrizBSD[root@matrizbsd103 ~]# pg_activity -U postgres
FATAL: column pg_stat_activity.waiting does not exist
LINE 11:         pg_stat_activity.waiting AS wait,
                 ^

Best Regard´s
Marcelo M Martins - SE System Engineer
